Notes: R-2R "2R": 16 bit rungs (R1-R16) + 2 terminations (R17=Y, R25=X). 0.1% or matched.
R-2R "R": series links (R18-R24=Y, R26-R32=X). 0.1% or matched; keep 2R=2x R.
X-hold / X-out / Y-out. HC (CMOS) - not LS.
X & Y unity-gain buffers. NOT MCP602 (rail-to-rail INPUT needed); same DIP-8 pinout.
Z-blank latch. OPTIONAL - only for an analog scope with a Z input. Tie unused pins 11 & 12 to GND.
Address decoder + latch clocks. Program with dac_decode.pld. ATF16V8 ok (lower power).
POWER INPUT - 5 V ONLY (center +). Never 9 V.
